title: CodeGrind DSA Practice Meets Cyberpunk Tower Defense Update
summary: Highlighting CodeGrind's updated tower-defense-themed problem visualization and Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, with new UI polish and real-time scoring.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends practical DSA practice with a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic, featuring an improved real-time editor, Azure OpenAI assistance, and refreshed problem-to-tower mappings that visualize programming concepts as defensive structures. See faster loading, smarter AI guidance, and a more immersive learning experience.
cta: Try a live problem now and watch towers generate code snippets as you solve.
visual_brief: Static product-like reveal image: CodeGrind editor interface with cyberpunk tower visuals, clear problem panel, and AI chat, plus shimmering towers representing ForLoop, IfCondition, and Function. Include subtle UI polish cues and a dark neon color palette.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
